arts.ttl: Man City agree six figure sum for young goalkeeper ahead of transfer window
arts.sum: Manchester City have agreed to add a young goalkeeper to their academy ranks when he turns 16 later this year

arts.ttl: Man City agree deal for first summer signing
arts.sum: Manchester City have agreed a 'deal in principle' to sign teenage Hibernian goalkeeper Ben Vickery, according to Fabrizio Romano. Man City agree deal for first summer signing - Romano

arts.ttl: 'Not ideal': Pep Guardiola makes Champions League admission that will surely boost Nottingham Forest's qualification hopes
Pep Guardiola reveals how long Man City Nathan Ake will be out for after defender underwent foot surgery
arts.sum: The centre-back was forced off at half-time in last weekend's FA Cup victory over Plymouth and later underwent an operation to repair a fracture in his foot.

arts.ttl: Edu talks Nottingham Forest owner into big decision – Arsenal research played a key role
arts.sum: Edu Gaspar was key to Nottingham Forest owner Evangelos Marinakis moving to invest in São Paulo, using information he’d garnered at Arsenal to his advantage. That’s according to journalist Jorge Nicola, who covers the ongoing situation with Marinakis’ ongoing effort to invest into Brazilian football. arts.ttl: Man City defender Ake out for 10 weeks after surgery
arts.sum: Manchester City hope defender Nathan Ake will be fit again before the end of the season after undergoing surgery on a fracture in his left foot.

arts.ttl: Manchester City defender Nathan Ake out for up to 11 weeks after foot surgery
